zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Jean II de Looz於1268年出生在比利時利包格波格洛時，他的父親Jan I van Loon-Chiny44歲，母親Isabella van Condé38歲。他和Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1310年1月19日在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Jean II de Looz于1268年出生在比利时利包格波格洛时，他的父亲Jan I van Loon-Chiny44岁，母亲Isabella van Condé38岁。他和Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1310年1月19日在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Looz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German and Swiss German: regional (Alemannic) nickname from Middle High German boese ‘ridiculous person, low-standing servant’ or from an ancient Germanic personal name Bozo (see Bosshart ).

variants.name: Bosshart
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Hans, Otto, Rudi.

Swiss German and South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bōs ‘bad, evil, wild, angry’ and hard ‘hardy, strong, brave’, or a derivative of a short form of the personal name Burkhart (see Boss ). Compare Boshart 1 and Buzzard 2.

variants.name: Booze
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Booz  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Jean II de Looz was born in 1268, in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium, his father, Jan I van Loon-Chiny, was 44 and his mother, Isabella van Condé, was 38. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. He died on 19 January 1310, in Genoa, Genova, Liguria, Italy, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Jean II de Looz est né en 1268, à Borgloon, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Jan I van Loon-Chiny, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabella van Condé, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1310, à Genès, Genova, Liguria, Italie, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Jean II de Looz 1268 in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan I van Loon-Chiny 44 und seine Mutter Isabella van Condé 38. Er hatte mit Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Januar 1310 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Genua, Genova, Liguria, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Jean II de Looz è nato il nel 1268 nel Borgloon, Limburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Jan I van Loon-Chiny, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Isabella van Condé, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. Morì il 19 gennaio 1310, nel Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Jean II de Loozが1268年にベルギーリンブルグボルグロオンで生まれた時，父Jan I van Loon-Chinyは44歳，母Isabella van Condéは38歳であった。彼はMarie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDEとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1310年1月19日にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァジェノヴァで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Jean II de Looz(이)가 1268년 벨기에 림버그 볼그루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan I van Loon-Chiny(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella van Condé(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 1월 19일 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 노바에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Jean II de Looz nasceu em 1268, em Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Jan I van Loon-Chiny, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabella van Condé, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1310, em Genova, Genova, Liguria, Itália, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Jean II de Looz родился в 1268 г. в местности борглун, лимбург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Jan I van Loon-Chiny было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella van Condé, 38. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. Он умер 19 января 1310 г. в местности дженова, дженова, лигуря, Италия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Jean II de Looz nació en 1268, en Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Jan I van Loon-Chiny, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Isabella van Condé, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Marie DE NESLE DE FALVY-D'AUDENARDE. Murió el 19 de enero de 1310, en Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, a la edad de 42 años.
